about.title: About Unity Darmarpan
about.description: Unity Darmarpan is a charitable community dedicated to helping those in need. We work together to support education, health, and social welfare initiatives in our community.
about.communityInfo: By joining the Unity Darmarpan community, you can participate in meaningful charitable activities and make a real difference in people’s lives.
about.donationInfo: You can contribute by donating any amount between ₹50 to ₹1000. Your support helps us continue our mission and expand our reach to more people in need.
about.footer: Your contribution, big or small, helps us bring hope and support to many. Join us today and be a part of the Unity Darmarpan movement!
